chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1406 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.5393/25 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 03.09.2025 Mr. Zaffar Ali Lanjar, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Sharyar Awan, Additional Advocate General. Mr. Gulzar Ali Malano, Deputy Prosecutor General a/w SIP Gulzar Ahmed on behalf of SSP Sukkur and ASI Raza Muhammad of P.S Mirwah. Respondent No.6 Akhtar Hussain, present in person..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- SIP Gulzar Ahmed filed statement on behalf of SSP Khairpur/ respondent No.2 and Incharge PP Pirwassan of P.S Mirwah has also filed his statement, which are taken on record. Investigation officer ASI Raza Muhammad states that, he recorded statement u/s 161 Cr.P.C of the petitioner No.1 wherein she disclosed that FIR bearing crime No.214/2025, u/s 365-B, 363 PPC at PP Pirwassan PS Mirwah was registered with false facts and no one kidnapped her. She wants to reside with her husband/ petitioner N.2 namely Nadir Ali Lashari. After recording statement u/s 161 Cr.P.C, on Court query, the investigation officer stats that he is of the view that FIR is to be disposed of under C-class and he seeks time for filing such report before learned Magistrate. After such statement of the investigation officer, the counsel for the petitioners satisfied and seeks disposal of the instant petition. Further Respondent No.6 Akhtar Hussain is present and states that family suit filed by him is also pending before the Court of learned IInd Family Judge Mirwah and he may proceed there for its disposal in accordance with law.

After such statement of the investigation officer, the counsel for the petitioners satisfied and seeks disposal of the instant petition. Further Respondent No.6 Akhtar Hussain is present and states that family suit filed by him is also pending before the Court of learned IInd Family Judge Mirwah and he may proceed there for its disposal in accordance with law. In the circumstances instant petition is disposed of and I.O is directed to file such statement (as suggested by him) within fifteen days. The official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
